blocks.text: DTC P0A94: Abnormal voltage stabilizer (DCDC) characteristics

The DC-DC converter prevents the electrical units from being reset due to a drop in 12V battery voltage when the car is restarted from idling stop (when the starter is driven) in vehicles equipped with idling stop systems using 12V batteries. The DC-DC converter is connected to the DC-DC startup (CST signal) line for the PGM-FI ECU to send a request to start boost operation and to the LIN communication line for sending failure diagnosis results to the PGM-FI ECU, The DC-DC converter sends a signal to the PGM-FI ECU via the LIN communication line when the self-diagnostic circuit detects an abnormality in the electrical unit. If the DC-DC converter failure information received from the LIN communication line continues for more than the specified time, the PGM-FI ECU determines a failure and stores the DTC.
Detection frequency, detection sequence, detection time required, detection method type, OBD status

rows.text: 24-hour (e.g. observation, operation (of a machine), care (of patient))
Detection order (of the DTC in question)
1D/C (single detection method), PGM-FI warning light: off
Normal judgment, failure judgment, not completed
Ignition switch/ ENGINE START STOP switch
DTC requesting the prohibition of detection of the relevant DTC

blocks.text: When the PGM-FI ECU continuously receives a fault signal transmitted from the DC-DC converter for more than 5.0 seconds.

items.text: Disconnection of cord between fuse box and DC-DC converter (+B DC/DC1 line)
Disconnection of cord between fuse box and DC-DC converter (+B DC/DC2 line)
Ground fault in cord between fuse box and DC-DC converter (+B DC/DC1 line)
Ground fault in cord between fuse box and DC-DC converter (+B DC/DC2 line)
Ground fault in cord (CST line) between PGM-FI ECU and DC-DC converter
Disconnection of the cord between IG1 relay 1 and DC-DC converter (IG-RLY line)
Ground fault in the cord (DC/DC OUT1 line) between each electrical unit and DC-DC converter
Ground fault in the cord (DC/DC OUT2 line) between each electrical unit and DC-DC converter
Failure of electrical unit to which power is supplied
Ground fault in DC-DC converter cord (GND line)

blocks.text: If the vehicle is determined to be faulty, the temporary DTC, DTC and freeze data are stored in the PGM-FI ECU memory without the PGM-FI warning light being turned on.
Temporary DTCs, DTCs and freeze data are cleared by using the clear command of the scan tool (including HDS) or by removing the 12V battery terminal.
